action.reasoning: Observation: Weighted ensemble = 423.03, same as equal weights. 20 min left, 5 iterations. Analysis: Val scores are too similar for weighting to matter. Decision: Try removing worst model from ensemble to see if 4-model ensemble is better. Also try squared inverse weighting.
